## Summary

## Checklist
_Please verify that your Pull Request fulfills these criteria:_
- [ ] My PR targets the `main` branch.
- [ ] I have read the `CONTRIBUTING.md` guidelines.
- [ ] I have documented my new assertions with a "War Story" or concrete example (if adding a new tactic).
- [ ] My language is professional, clear, and authoritative.
- [ ] I have run my changes locally to ensure there are no formatting or broken markdown/link errors.

## Does this close an existing issue?
_If yes, list it here (e.g., "Closes #15")._
